+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "valkey: [NEW] Support database level ACL",
+    "description": "[NEW] Support database level ACL. Requested by 18+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current valkey setup",
+        "description": "Verify your valkey version and configuration:\n```bash\nvalkey-server --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working valkey installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\n**The problem/use-case that the feature addresses**\n\nExtend ACL to include a way to restrict users to a specific database."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [NEW] Support database level ACL",
+        "description": "## cluster: add multi-database support in cluster mode\n\nAdd multi-database support in cluster mode to align with standalone mode\nand facilitate migration. Previously, cluster mode was restricted to a\nsingle database (DB0). This change allows multiple databases while\npreserving the existing slot-based key distribution.\n\n### Key Features:\n- Database-Agnostic Hashing. The hashing algorithm is unchanged.\n  Identical keys always map to the same slot across all databases,\n  ensuring consistent key\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[NEW] Support database level ACL\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## cluster: add multi-database support in cluster mode\n\nAdd multi-database support in cluster mode to align with standalone mode\nand facilitate migration. Previously, cluster mode was restricted to a\nsingle database (DB0). This change allows multiple databases while\npreserving the existing slot-based key distribution.\n\n### Key Features:\n- Database-Agnostic Hashing.",

+    }
+  },
